tooltip.flux_turret.gatling_turret: Haha, gun goes BRRRRRRR! Needs a tiny warm-up to spin, then rains absolute bullet hell. Individual damage is smol, but quantity is a quality of its own!
tooltip.flux_turret.tesla_coil: UNLIMITED POWER! Zap zap! Heavy electric shocker that makes monsters do the electric slide. Discharges at a snail's pace, but hits like a flying truck. Bzzzt!
tooltip.flux_turret.prism_tower: A literal L.A.S.E.R. party! Connect multiple shiny towers to summon a giant spicy laser pointer. When they link up, damage and range go stonks! 📈
tooltip.flux_turret.grand_cannon: THE CHAD FRENCH GRAND CANNON. Yeets giant explosive shells from the next zip code. Massive area boom-boom, but environmentally friendly (no block damage). Absolute unit.
flux_turret.config.title: gxFlux Configuration
